activities_projects.title: Climatic Controls Explanation
steps: Read the section on climatic controls
List latitude, altitude, pressure and wind system, distance from sea, ocean currents and relief
Write two lines explaining how each affects climate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how different factors influence climate
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and explanation of factors (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Temperature Variation Study
steps: Identify two hot places and two cold places in India
Note their approximate temperatures
Explain why temperatures vary between these places

activities_projects.title: Monsoon Wind Flow Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the direction of monsoon winds
steps: Draw a map outline of India
Show the direction of southwest monsoon winds
Label Arabian Sea branch and Bay of Bengal branch
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students visualize the movement of monsoon winds
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of diagram and labeling (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Seasonal Weather Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare weather conditions in different seasons
steps: Create a table with columns for winter, summer and monsoon
Write key characteristics of each season
Mention rainfall and temperature conditions

activities_projects.title: Local Climate Observation
activities_projects.objective: Relate textbook knowledge to local climate
steps: Observe weather conditions in your area for three days
Note temperature, wind and rainfall
Compare your observations with the climate patterns described in the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students relate theory with real-life climate conditions

activities_projects.title: Rainfall Distribution Map Activity
steps: Study the rainfall map in the chapter
Identify regions with high rainfall
Identify regions with low rainfall and explain reasons

activities_projects.title: Loo and Local Winds Study
steps: Read about the 'Loo' winds
Write three features of these winds
Explain their impact on people during summer

activities_projects.title: Cyclone Impact Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand effects of cyclones in India
steps: Find a recent cyclone news report
Write where it occurred
Describe the impact on people and property
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand natural disasters related to climate

activities_projects.title: Monsoon Break Concept
steps: Read the section about breaks in monsoon
Explain what is meant by break in monsoon
Describe its impact on rainfall distribution

activities_projects.title: Monsoon as a Unifying Bond
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of monsoon for India
steps: Read the section on monsoon as a unifying bond
Write how monsoon affects agriculture
Explain how it connects people across regions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of monsoon in India's unity
